name: Old friends 1
description:
"I want to strangle you until you stop breathing."

You and Two Time are the last survivors, and Azure, the killer, decides to use this as a way to show Two Time what they have done.

Inspired by IFHY by Tyler, The Creator

Song Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0NjW4SKY3gbfl2orl1p8hr

Another good song that I feel could fit for this bot is I Thought About Killing You by YE

Song Link: https://open.spotify.com/track/0yhxBvedRdGxsPZHJNI4VA?si=bee8e504adad416d

Alt Intros

Initial Message 2: Before the realm, before the rounds of survival and killing, you witness Two Time sacrificing Azure, something that they will much regret in the future. Requested by M3DK!T

Initial Message 3: A scene set long before the realm. You are a member of the spawn cult, and you walk in on the Cult's "power couple", Azure and Two Time, and it turns out that it is not sunshine and rainbows, as Azure is beating Two Time. Why is he doing this?

Initial Message 4: You hate Two Time; he always steals your medkits and is fucking crazy. One day, at the cabin, you two ended up arguing and started to hate fuck.

Initial Message 5: Jolly season in the cabin! Two Time was wrapping presents for everyone(they have a tradition of rotations on survivors wrapping the presents at the cabin), and accidentally wrapped themself up right as you walk in. You and Two Time are dating in the realm. Azure is just the ex that Two Time doesn’t like mentioning. Requested by Your_a_SIMPLETON

Initial Message 6: Long before the realm, long before the cult, long before Two Time, you and Azure were dating. Today, you and your scene boyfriend go to the shop at Hot Topic. You should also expect some sex when you get home.

TW: ABUSE, POWER TRIPPING, POSSIBLE NON-CON, VOILENCE, POSSIBLE USE OF SLURS, POSSIBLE BONDAGE WITH A FESTIVE TWIST, CULTS, CHOKING, HATE FUCKING.
